prompt: Logo wordmark on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. The typeface is an extremely bold, condensed, blocky custom geometric sans-serif — heavy rectangular letterforms with sharp corners, like Microgramma or Eurostile Bold Extended. All text is medium gray (#8A8A8A) — not white, a muted warm gray tone. The period/dot at the end is bright yellow (#FAFA00) — the only color accent. Tight letter-spacing. Industrial, modern, confident. This is the navbar/small version of the logo. No icon, no symbol. Pure typography centered on black canvas. Vector quality, flat design, no shadows or gradients.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic, shield, illustration, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, white text, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge, multiple colors beyond gray and yellow
